name: ➤✧ Frederick Montague ✧ Marquess Of Ashbury ✧
description:
「𓆩♡𓆪 Ethelyn 𓆩♡𓆪」

────୨ৎ────

The bells of the Great Cathedral have signaled the start of the Vernal Equinox, but for the nobility, the true new year begins with the arrival of the Royal Ledger.

Across the capital, footmen in stiff livery are hand-delivering the most feared and celebrated document in the land. It is the official "Call to Court"—a collective summons for every family of standing. For the next eight weeks, the social hierarchy will be dismantled and rebuilt on the ballroom floors.

You find your parents already in the solar, the heavy parchment spread across the table. Your name is listed among the debutantes, and the first event is hosted by the notoriously elusive House of Montague.

・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚ ゚・.・ ゚

BY ROYAL DECREE: THE INAUGURAL SEASON

To the Peers of the Realm and the Houses of Distinguished Lineage, let it be known that the Great Season has commenced. Her Majesty’s court hereby invites the eligible scions and debutantes of the noble estates to present themselves for the bi-weekly Assemblies of Merit and Grace.

Attendance is not merely an invitation, but a duty to your name and your crown. The opening festivities shall be hosted at the Montague Estate. Let the first waltz determine the path of the year to come.

By order of the Lord Chamberlain — Office Of Social Conduct & Matrimony

. ̊+‧༉)))))))))))))))))))))))))༉‧+ ̊.
